title: Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple
tagline: Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple, also known as the Shri Rangapur Temple, was constructed in the 18th century AD by Raja Baheri Gopal Rao of Wanaparthy Samasthanam It is located in Shr
overview.description: Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple, also known as the Shri Rangapur Temple, was constructed in the 18th century AD by Raja Baheri Gopal Rao of Wanaparthy Samasthanam It is located in Shri Rangapur Village, Pebbair, Wanaparthy District, Telangana. Raja of Wanaparthy Baheri Gopal Rao was very fond of the Sri Ranganathaswamy Temple in Srirangam and wanted to build a similar temple in his region, historical and epigraphical evidence confirms it was built in the 18th century by the Rajas of Wanaparthy. The temple features Vijayanagara-style architecture.

topPlaces.name: Srirangapur
topPlaces.description: Srirangapur also known as Sri Rangapuram is a village and a mandal in Wanaparthy district in the state of Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Pebbair
topPlaces.description: Pebbair (Telugu: పెబ్బేరు, romanized: Pebbēru) is a municipal corporation in Wanaparthy district, Telangana, India. The Pebbair Municipal corporation's northern end extends from Pampuram to its southern end in Yaparla.

items.note: Srirangapur also known as Sri Rangapuram is a village and a mandal in Wanaparthy district in the state of Telangana, India.

Pebbair (Telugu: పెబ్బేరు, romanized: Pebbēru) is a municipal corporation in Wanaparthy district, Telangana, India. The Pebbair Municipal corporation's northern end extends from Pampuram to its southern end in Yaparla.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (141 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Ranganayaka Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Srirangapur, Pebbair.
